entries.name: krakovna_bicycle
entries.source_paper: Randlov & Alstrom 1998
entries.failure: Agent rides in tight circles instead of reaching the goal.
entries.mechanism: Progress reward (distance decrease) without regression penalty.

entries.mechanism: Distance-to-target measured in the wrong reference frame.
